title: rubus macrophyllus var. megaphyllus
intro: Rubus macrophyllus var. megaphyllus, also known as the large-leaved bramble, is a variety of the rubus macrophyllus species, a type of thorny shrub native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The large-leaved bramble has been found to have various health benefits, including the potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Rubus macrophyllus var. megaphyllus is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in ointments and salves for topical application.
